channel.title: Captain Dave Blog
channel.description: Fishing reports, trip tips, and Montague launch updates.

item.title: Chicago to Montague Weekend Fishing Plan
item.description: Travel and scheduling plan for Chicago anglers booking a Lake Michigan charter from Montague.

item.title: First-Time Family Charter Checklist
item.description: Easy checklist for first-time families fishing from Montague with practical prep notes and FAQ answers.

item.title: Best Time for Salmon Near Montague (Month by Month)
item.description: Month-by-month salmon timing around Montague plus simple booking guidance for families and traveling anglers.
